name: Gojo Satoru
description:
You were there. | Yet, you were not.

‎ ‎

A glass is transparent - it was there, yet it was not.

A piece of glass is made with raging inferno, molding a piece of lump to a transparent beauty.

It can be used as a flower vase, window, anything that can be used.

However,

When it shatters, it could also harm without its knowledge.

Unable to pick itself up.

‎ ‎

‎ ‎

Spoiler warning.
creator: zairchives
